description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky handgun with a pixelated aesthetic reminiscent of retro video games. The main body and slide are patterned with alternating red and black squares, creating a bold, checkered appearance. The grip is a solid brown color, angular in shape, and visually distinct from the rest of the gun, with a simple, geometric form. The trigger guard is integrated into the grip area, forming a squared-off, robust structure. The barrel is short and blocky, matching the overall pixelated design, and there are no visible external markings or embellishments on the slide or barrel. The magazine base is not distinctly separated from the grip, maintaining the same angular, blocky style as the rest of the object.
description: A pixelated, checkered red-and-black handgun with a solid brown, angular grip and a blocky, geometric design.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the checkered red-and-black slide and the solid brown grip, with the squared trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the narrow, rectangular muzzle and the layered, blocky construction of the slide.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the checkered slide and the brown grip, with the trigger guard and grip contours visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the slide and grip, emphasizing the blocky, pixelated structure and the checkered pattern.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and blocky, rendered in a solid brown color with no visible texturing, finger grooves, or embellishments. Its surface appears smooth and unadorned, lacking any logos or ergonomic contouring, and it maintains a simple, geometric profile consistent with the overall pixelated style.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, squared-off, and robust, seamlessly integrated into the grip area. It lacks curvature or undercuts, presenting a solid, rectangular form with no visible reinforcement, texturing, or accessory rails.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short, blocky, and unadorned, matching the pixelated, geometric design of the object. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior is finished in the same checkered red-and-black pattern as the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is covered entirely by the red-and-black checkered pattern, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative elements present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not distinctly separated from the grip and follows the same angular, blocky design. It is flat and untextured, with no visible finger rests, flares, or logos, maintaining the minimalist, pixelated aesthetic.
